touren.name: 13 Days Discover Kenya Historic Railway Journey
touren.desc: Built during the Scramble for Africa, the „Lunatic Express“ was the one genuinely strategic railway to be constructed in tropical Africa at that time. With steam-powered access to Uganda, the British could transport people and soldiers to ensure their domination of the African Great Lakes region. The Uganda Railway was named after its ultimate destination, for its entire original 1,060-kilometre length actually lay in what would become Kenya. Construction began at the port city of Mombasa in British East Africa in 1896 and finished at the line's terminus, Kisumu, on the eastern shore of Lake Victoria, in 1901.
included: Accommodation and meals according to travel description.
Transport in the Mini Van with folding roof for sight and photography.
Activities and parking fees according to the travel description.
excluded: Price supplements for Christmas and New Year.
Everything that is not mentioned in the travel description.

touren.name: 07 Days Family Safari Rift Valley & Maasai Mara
touren.desc: Embark on a captivating seven-day safari adventure in Kenya, commencing in Nairobi. Upon arrival, a personal guide warmly welcomes you and escorts you to the Trademark Hotel for relaxation and preparation. The journey continues to Lake Naivasha, where you enjoy a boat ride to identify diverse bird species. Subsequent days at Lake Naivasha offer exploration of Hells Gate National Park and optional visits to Mt. Longonot National Park. The safari then advances to the renowned Maasai Mara Game Reserve, featuring spectacular landscapes and abundant wildlife. Basecamp Mara provides a base for daily game drives . For families, the Young Explorers' Club offers tailored wildlife-focused activities, while the final day concludes with a return to Nairobi for departure. Additional activities and meals are available at an extra cost.
included: Accommodation and meals as stipulated in the itinerary.

touren.name: 12 Days Photographic Safari Kenya
touren.desc: Embark on a 12-day odyssey through the enchanting landscapes of Kenya, a journey that seamlessly blends wildlife exploration, cultural immersion, and breathtaking scenery. Commencing in Nairobi, our adventure unfolds with a visit to the National Museum's bird gallery before setting out on a scenic drive to Lake Naivasha, offering panoramic views of Mt. Suswa and Mt. Longonot. From the geothermal wonders of Hell's Gate National Park to the picturesque shores of Lake Baringo, each day promises unique encounters, whether observing flamingoes or experiencing the vibrant life around freshwater lakes. As the expedition winds through Iten, Kisumu, and the shores of Lake Victoria, optional excursions to Kakamega forest or Rusinga Island beckon. The journey crescendos in the iconic Maasai Mara Game Reserve, where the majesty of wildlife, cultural experiences, and the option for a hot air balloon adventure awaits. This comprehensive exploration culminates in Nairobi, leaving indelible memories of Kenya's diverse landscapes and vibrant tapestry of life.

touren.name: 07 Days Tour de Kenya Cycling Safari
touren.desc: Embark on a thrilling 7-day cycling adventure through the scenic landscapes of Kenya. Starting in Ngong Hills, the ride descends into the Great Rift Valley, featuring sandy roads and occasional slippery downhills. After a refreshing lunch in Naivasha, explore the "Hells Gate" national park, known for its volcanic activity and game viewing opportunities on foot or bike. The journey continues to Lake Elementaita, offering birdwatching and a ride through Sosyambu Conservancy. Ride up to Lake Nakuru National Park for a game drive, spotting diverse wildlife and millions of flamingos. Proceed to Lake Baringo, with a picturesque ride and water sports in the afternoon. Explore Lake Bogoria Game Reserve for stunning scenery and cultural sights before returning to Lake Baringo for more local exploration. The final day includes a ride around Lake Baringo, water sports, and a return journey to Nairobi, concluding a memorable cycling expedition through Kenya's diverse landscapes.
excluded: Please enter your email address and/or telephone number.

touren.name: 12 Days across Kenya
touren.desc: Embark on a 12-day adventure through the diverse landscapes and wildlife of Kenya. Begin with a visit to Samburu Game Reserve, experiencing the unique culture of the Samburu people and enjoying game viewing in the rugged hills and plains. Explore the Ngare Ndare Forest, home to a variety of birds and animals, including the elusive colobus monkey. Journey to Lake Nakuru National Park to witness the spectacular flamingo gatherings and the conservation success story of rhinos. Continue to the iconic Maasai Mara Game Reserve, known for its abundant wildlife and the annual wildebeest migration. Immerse yourself in the Swara Plains Wildlife Conservancy, encountering Kenya's majestic animals. Head to Amboseli National Park, framed by the breathtaking Mount Kilimanjaro, for more wildlife encounters and stunning views. Conclude your adventure with exploration of Tsavo East National Park, home to the Big 5 and numerous bird species. The journey ends with a return to Nairobi and departure from the airport.
included: Overnight stay and meals according to the itinerary.
Transport in Mini Van with folding roof for sight and photography.
Game drives and parking fees according to the itinerary.
excluded: surcharges at Easter, Christmas, and New Year.
Anything not mentioned in the itinerary.

touren.name: 10 Days Flying Safari Amboseli & Northern Kenya
touren.desc: Embark on an enchanting 10-day safari adventure through the diverse landscapes of Kenya, starting in Nairobi at the charming Manzili House. Fly to the iconic Amboseli National Park for two days of immersive game drives, witnessing the majestic Mt. Kilimanjaro as a backdrop. Stay at the exclusive Tortilis Camp, offering a luxurious safari experience with spacious tents and breathtaking views. Continue to the Samburu Game Reserve, home to unique wildlife, and stay at the eco-chic Saruni Samburu camp for an intimate safari experience. Explore Ol Pejeta Conservancy, known for its conservation efforts and diverse wildlife, while staying at Tambarare Camp with its luxurious tents overlooking Mount Kenya. Conclude your journey with a night in Nairobi at Amzili, reflecting on the unforgettable moments before departing from JKIA airport. This safari promises a perfect blend of wildlife encounters, cultural experiences, and luxurious accommodations, creating lasting memories of Kenya's natural beauty and rich biodiversity.
included: Soft drinks, house wines, beers & select non-luxury spirits.
Shared day & night game drives in 4x4 vehicles and guided bush walks
One complimentary Back & Neck massage (30 min.) per room per stay
Warriors Academy (upon request and bookable in advance)

touren.name: 04 Days Kayaking on Ewaso Nyiro River
touren.desc: Embark on an extraordinary four-day adventure deep into Kenya's southern Great Rift Valley, where dramatic landscapes, ancient history, wild rivers, and authentic Maasai culture converge in one unforgettable journey. This off-the-beaten-path expedition begins with a scenic drive from Nairobi, descending past the iconicOlorgesailie Prehistoric Site—home to some of the world's most significant early human artifacts—before reaching the toweringNguruman Escarpment, a 50-kilometer natural wall that forms the western boundary of the Rift Valley and marks the Kenya-Tanzania border.
included: All meals, snacks, drinks and a basic bar.
All camping and kayaking equipment, including dry bags for day use.
Conservancy entrance, camping, community visits, baboon tour. Motorbike transfers, community run game drive and guiding fees.
An ‘Eco stove’ (valued at $40) per participant to be handed over to the community. Each stove saves 3 trees (or 3 tons of carbon) per year (making international trips to Kenya carbon neutral).
excluded: Bar Bills and food on the road trip

WHAT TO BRING - Lightweight, quick-dry clothing; long sleeves/pants for evenings and sun protection - Sun hat, high-SPF sunscreen, SPF lip balm, sunglasses - Shoes that stay on in water (river shoes/sandals) + sturdy walking shoes for bushwalks - Sleeping bag or light blanket, liner, small pillow (available on request) - Head torch, compact penknife, insect repellent, camera/phone with waterproof case - Personal medications, reusable water bottle, enthusiasm and curiosity
Please enter your email address and/or telephone number.

touren.name: 10 Days Kenya Without the Crowds
touren.desc: Embark on a captivating 10-day journey through Kenya's diverse landscapes and cultural treasures. The adventure begins in Nairobi, leading to Sagana, where adrenaline awaits with activities like ziplining, kayaking, and rafting at the Getway Resort. The expedition then heads to Meru National Park, known for its untouched beauty and abundant wildlife, offering a unique safari experience at Ikweta Safari Camp. Continue to the Samburu Game Reserve for encounters with Grevy's zebras, elephants, and diverse bird species, finding comfort and hospitality at Samburu Intrepids. Explore the scenic Ngare Ndare Forest, with its captivating canopy walkway and waterfalls, before heading.  Then travel to the Laikipia region, where you have the chance to see rare animals like black leopards and wild dogs. The journey proceeds to Ol Pejeta Conservancy, a haven for wildlife conservation and home to the last northern white rhinos, with accommodation at Serena Sweetwaters. The final day brings a game drive through Ol Pejeta and a return to Nairobi, concluding this remarkable expedition with memories of Kenya's natural wonders and vibrant cultures.
included: Transport in a Land Cruiser with folding roof for sight and photography.
Game drives and parking fees according to the itinerary.
excluded: surcharges at Easter, Christmas, and New Year.
Anything not mentioned in the itinerary.

touren.name: 08 Days Classic Kenyan Safari Horizons
touren.desc: Embark on an unforgettable 8-day safari adventure in Kenya, starting with a warm welcome in Nairobi. The journey takes you to Lake Nakuru National Park, where you'll witness the beauty of flamingos and encounter diverse wildlife, including rhinos. Proceed to the iconic Masai Mara Game Reserve, renowned for its abundant wildlife and breathtaking landscapes. Enjoy game drives, optional hot air balloon rides, and a visit to a Maasai tribal village. Continuing to Lake Naivasha, indulge in a boat ride and birdwatching, followed by a visit to Amboseli National Park, famous for its large herds of elephants with the stunning backdrop of Mt. Kilimanjaro. Immerse yourself in morning and afternoon game drives, spotting a variety of wildlife. The adventure concludes back in Nairobi, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Kenya's remarkable natural beauty and wildlife.

touren.name: 05 Days Western Kenya
touren.desc: Embark on a diverse and immersive 6-day journey through Kenya's natural wonders, starting with a morning departure from Nairobi to Eldoret. The adventure begins with a nature walk and birding at Kaptagat Forest, a vital water catchment for Lake Victoria. Continue to Saiwa Swamp National Park, a haven for nature lovers and home to rare species like the Sitatunga antelope and De Brazza's monkey. Next, explore Mt. Elgon National Park, known for its towering cliffs, caves, and diverse wildlife. Move on to Kakamega Forest for bird watching, hiking, and encounters with unique mammals. The journey then takes you to the shores of Lake Victoria in Kisumu, where an optional day allows exploration of Maragoli Hills or Kapsimotwa Gardens, offering panoramic views and birding opportunities. Conclude the trip with a train ride back to Nairobi, passing through scenic landscapes and historic landmarks. This enriching itinerary combines nature walks, bird watching, and cultural experiences, providing a comprehensive exploration of Kenya's natural and cultural heritage.
included: Return ground transport: Pick-up & drop-off at hotel
excluded: Please enter your email address and/or telephone number.

touren.desc: Kenya has 536 km coastline with different culture and landscape. With this tour we will give you a first impression about diversity from Diani Beach near the Tanzanian border to Lamu with it´s amazing Swahili culture. Discover the coast.

touren.name: 07 Days Lake Turkana Adventure
touren.desc: Embark on a captivating 7-day adventure around Lake Turkana, starting with a morning flight from Nairobi to Lodwar. Upon arrival, you'll be greeted by a representative and driven to Eliye Springs on the shores of Lake Turkana, the world's largest desert lake known as the cradle of mankind. Stay at the Eliye Springs Resort, experiencing traditional Turkana culture and visiting the fishing village of Longelech. Explore Nariokotome, home to the Turkana boy fossil site, and visit Kalokol, a center for Turkana fishermen. Venture to Central Island National Park with its volcanic crater lakes and Nile Crocodile breeding grounds. Relax on the beach or opt for a bird watching tour on Central Island. Head to Moite to discover the El Molo ethnic group, exclusive traditional fishermen, and visit their sacred shrine. Spend your last day enjoying the beach, sun, and optional activities like a massage or fishing trip. Conclude your unforgettable journey with a boat trip and Sundowner before departing from Lodwar to Nairobi on day 7.
included: Accommodation and meals as stipulated in the itinerary.
Transport in a chauffeur driven Land Cruiser.

touren.name: 10 Days Maasai Wedding and Honeymoon
touren.desc: Embark on a unique and romantic 10-day journey through Kenya, beginning with a city stay at Karen Blixen Coffee Garden in Nairobi. Your adventure truly commences with a flight to the Maasai Mara Game Reserve, a wildlife haven renowned for its annual wildebeest migration. Nestled in the heart of this breathtaking landscape is Leopard Hill, your luxurious accommodation, offering splendid views of the Naboisho Conservancy. Immerse yourself in the wonders of the Maasai Mara, with opportunities for hot air balloon rides and a chance to experience a traditional Maasai wedding ceremony. Your journey continues as you fly to Diani Beach, where Chale Island awaits. Here, you'll reside in an Overwater Suite or On the Rock Suite at The Sands at Chale Island, surrounded by indigenous forest and pristine beaches. Enjoy a range of activities, from snorkeling to spa treatments, before concluding your idyllic honeymoon with a drop-off at Mombasa Airport for your international departure. This itinerary promises a perfect blend of wildlife adventure, cultural experiences, and romantic beachside relaxation.
included: Bed & breakfast at The Tribe Hotel
Half board at The Sands at Chale Island
Maasai wedding incl. blessing, hire of traditional Maasai bride, sparkling wine, cake, bush dinner.

touren.name: 07 Days Flying Safari Rift Valley & Maasai Mara
touren.desc: There is a place in Africa where the wound of a great rupture promises abundant life in its healing. It is a place of brooding mountains, of Great Plains and whispering lakes - a place that attracts a diversity of life to its wonders - and it was once believed to be the birthplace of consciousness in mankind. Eight lakes make up the Kenya Rift Valley Lake system, two of which are freshwater and the rest alkaline. The large flocks of flamingoes for which the Kenyan lakes have become famous are found on the alkaline soda lakes feeding on tiny crustaceans.
included: Accommodation in one of our luxurious tents
All meals and drinks (including alcoholic beverages)
Daily game drives and game drives at night in 13,500 hectares!
Conservancy fees and unlimited access to the exclusive Olare Motorogi Conservancy
Visits to the local markets (open on Thursdays)
Complimentary wireless internet available throughout the camp
Informative talks on local culture, flora, fauna, and conservation that can be organized on request for both adults and children.
Main Tent equipped with a TV, DVDs, iPod and sound system and a small library of books and games.
No fees for early check-in or late check-out game drives, subject to availability

touren.name: 12 Days Family Safari
touren.desc: Embark on an unforgettable 14-night journey through the diverse landscapes of Kenya, blending vibrant city life, thrilling wildlife safaris, scenic highlands, and idyllic beach relaxation. Your adventure begins in the bustling capital of Nairobi, before heading to the lush green hills of Sagana. Continue with exciting game viewing in Meru National Park, followed by classic riverine safari experiences in Samburu. Explore the wild beauty of Ngare Ndare Forest and the Laikipia Plateau, enjoy lakeside serenity at Lake Naivasha, and conclude with pure indulgence on the pristine shores of Watamu. This carefully curated itinerary offers the perfect mix of cultural discovery, exciting safaris, and coastal bliss, ending with a convenient drop-off at Mombasa Airport.

touren.name: 10 Days Western Kenya Adventure
touren.desc: Embark on a captivating 10-day journey through Kenya, starting with a city stay at Trademark Hotel in Nairobi. The adventure takes you to the renowned Maasai Mara Game Reserve, where you'll witness the incredible wildlife, including prides of lions and the annual wildebeest migration. Following the Mara, travel to Mbita on Lake Victoria, enjoying a scenic drive through the Rift Valley. Explore Ruma National Park, known for its efforts in conserving the endangered Roan antelope, and experience the cultural richness of Kisumu, including Lake Simbi Nyaima and the Duga Wetlands. Venture to Kakamega Forest for nature walks and bird watching. Game drives in Lake Nakuru National Park and a boat ride on Lake Naivasha to Crescent Island, where you walk among giraffes and zebras.  Conclude the journey with a return to Nairobi, marking the end of this diverse and enriching safari experience.

touren.name: 12 Days Western Kenya & Rift Valley
touren.desc: This captivating 12-day Kenya safari and cultural adventure begins in the vibrant capital of Nairobi and takes you on a journey through some of Kenya’s most diverse and breathtaking landscapes. From the tranquil shores of Lake Naivasha with its boat excursions and thrilling game drives in Hell’s Gate National Park, to the flamingo-filled soda lakes of Nakuru and Baringo, the itinerary offers a rich blend of wildlife, scenic beauty, and unique experiences. You’ll explore the dramatic Kerio Valley and Rimoi National Reserve, discover the lush biodiversity of Kakamega Forest, and enjoy serene boat rides on the Dunga Wetlands near Lake Victoria. The journey culminates in the world-famous Maasai Mara, where you will enjoy two full days of exceptional game viewing in one of Africa’s premier wildlife destinations.
